headline: It Was a Busy Week for Videogames. Keep An Eye on These Stocks.
summary: Layoffs, console price hikes, game price declines, are just some of the news that broke in the videogame space this week.

headline: What Moved Markets This Week
summary: U.S. stocks ended lower on the week as elevated U.S.-Iran tensions remained in focus. Read more about this week's major events on Wall Street.
